title_en: Zarzir Council Head on Missile Strike: 'Devastating Impact, Seven Meters from Homes, Completely Destroyed'
summary_en: The head of the Zarzir local council reported that a missile struck the settlement, landing seven meters from residential structures and causing total destruction to nearby homes. This incident indicates a direct attack on Israeli territory, likely part of the ongoing hostilities involving Iranian-backed groups or state actors targeting northern Israel.

content_original: Magen David Adom added that it is currently treating a 34-year-old woman moderately injured by shrapnel wounds on her back.
title_en: Sirens sound in northern Israel for third time in three hours; multiple people reported wounded
summary_en: Air raid sirens were activated in northern Israel for the third time within three hours, resulting in shrapnel injuries to at least one civilian, including a 34-year-old woman. This incident indicates ongoing cross-border hostilities, likely involving rocket or drone fire from Iran-aligned groups such as Hezbollah, contributing to the escalation of the regional conflict.
